sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31796" key="e)/kgelws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔκγελως</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n31796.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loud laughter,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:199" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.199</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
